app.name: Area Code
map.quietHere: Quiet here | see what's happening nearby
map.beFirst: Be the first to check in today.
checkin.tooFar: You are too far from this venue
checkin.weakSignal: Weak signal | move closer to the entrance
checkin.locationUnavailable: Location unavailable. Try moving to an open area.
checkin.scanQr: Scan the venue's QR code to check in
location.permissionTitle: Area Code needs your location to check in.
node.andOthers: {{name}} and {{count}} others you follow are here
rewards.yourCodesHint: Show these to staff to claim.
rewards.codeHint: Show this code to staff to claim your reward.

auth.signup.title: Create Account
auth.signup.consentAnalytics: Contribute anonymised check-in data to city insights
auth.signup.consentBroadcast: Show my activity on the map
auth.signup.googleExplainer: Create your profile with Google. You can set your username and city after signing in.
auth.login.title: Sign In
auth.login.passwordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.signup.emailFailed: Could not create your account. Check your details.
auth.signup.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.signup.haveToken: Got a code from a venue?
auth.signup.tokenInvalid: Couldn't apply that code, but your account is ready.
auth.forgotHint: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset code.
auth.codeHint: Check your email for a 6-digit code.
auth.resetInvalid: Invalid or expired code. Try again.
auth.resetDone: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in.
auth.firstGet.title: Got a code from a venue?
auth.firstGet.subtitle: If a venue gave you a one-time code at the till, enter it here. Otherwise, skip. You can still use the app normally.
auth.firstGet.skip: Skip | I don't have a code
auth.firstGet.tokenFailed: Couldn't apply that code. Check it with the venue or skip for now.
qr.cooldownHint: Come back again after your cooldown ends.
qr.signInHint: We'll bring you right back here after you sign in.
qr.invalidToken: This QR code is no longer valid. Ask the venue to reprint.
qr.cooldown: You have already checked in here recently.
qr.venueGone: This venue is no longer listed.
qr.generic: Check-in failed. Please try again at the venue.
proximity.keepStreak: Check in to keep your streak going.
errors.loadFailed: Failed to load. Please try again.
profile.exportFailed: Couldn't download your data. Try again.
profile.deleteHistoryConfirmBody: This will permanently delete all your check-in history. This action cannot be undone.
profile.deleteAccountBody: This will permanently delete your account, check-in history, rewards, and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
auth.login.wrongDoor: This number is registered to a business account. Sign in here →
auth.signupSheet.title: Sign up to check in, earn gets, and climb the ranks
auth.error.network: Unable to connect. Check your connection and try again.
profile.title: Profile
profile.privacyToggle: Show my activity on the map
profile.privacyExplainer: Your name is only visible to people you both follow. Everyone else sees the vibe, not who.
streak.badge: {{count}}-night streak. Check in today to keep it.
notif.priming.personalized: {{name}} just checked in to {{venue}}, {{distance}} away. Turn on notifications to catch moments like this.
notif.priming.generic: Get notified about gets, streaks, and activity near you.
share.text: Check this out on Area Code
auth.landing.subtitle: Discover what's happening around you

crowdVibe.title: Crowd Vibe
profile.streaming.consentBody: We'll access your listening history to determine your music personality. Your data is processed to derive genre preferences and a personality archetype. You can disconnect at any time.

privacy.settings.title: Visibility

privacy.level.publicDesc: Anyone can see your check-ins on the feed and leaderboard
privacy.level.friendsOnlyDesc: Only mutual follows can see your activity
privacy.level.privateDesc: Nobody can see your check-in activity
